assertionResults.evidence: test_awq_dual_dispatch.py: ALL TESTS PASSED. AWQ dual kernel loads successfully. Code inspection confirms engine.py correctly selects AWQ dual kernel (12 params, no zeros) when AWQ mode enabled. Engine correctly selects GPTQ dual kernel (14 params, with zeros) when AWQ mode disabled. Kernel function loads: func=637884288.
assertionResults.consoleOutput:

  GPTQ dual kernel has 14 parameters (with gate_zeros and up_zeros)

  PASS: Engine correctly selects AWQ dual kernel (12 params, no zeros) when AWQ mode enabled
  PASS: Engine correctly selects GPTQ dual kernel (14 params, with zeros) when AWQ mode disabled
--- Test 4: E2E Decode (No NaN/Inf) ---

assertionResults.evidence: test_awq_dual_gemv.py: All throughput benchmarks PASSED. AWQ dual kernel shows 1.034-1.058x speedup over GPTQ dual kernel, exceeding 1.02x target.
assertionResults.consoleOutput:

assertionResults.evidence: E2E validation blocked: Model at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ is detected as 'gptq' format (has qzeros tensors). Running AWQ kernel mode with GPTQ weights causes NaN/Inf because AWQ kernel skips zero-point subtraction (assumes zeros=0), but GPTQ weights have non-zero zero points. C dispatch integration code verified correct by code inspection and kernel loading tests.
assertionResults.consoleOutput:
Model format check: Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has qzeros=True, detected as GPTQ format
C dispatch integration verified via code inspection (engine.py lines 3452-3503)

blockers.description: Model labeled 'AWQ' at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has qzeros tensors (GPTQ format). AWQ kernel mode with GPTQ weights produces NaN/Inf because AWQ kernel skips zero-point subtraction.
blockers.suggestedResolution: Download true AWQ Qwen 3.5 27B model from HuggingFace (e.g., from casper-hansen/AwqModels) that has qweight/scales but NO qzeros tensors.

VAL-AWQ-001.summary: AWQ dual kernel produces numerically correct output (max_abs_err < 1e-2)

VAL-AWQ-002.summary: AWQ dual kernel loads and engine correctly selects it when AWQ mode enabled
VAL-AWQ-002.confidence: high - kernel loading and code inspection verified

VAL-AWQ-003.summary: AWQ dual kernel shows 2.6-4.7% speedup over GPTQ dual kernel

VAL-AWQ-004.summary: C dispatch integration code correct, cannot validate E2E without true AWQ model
